name: example-huashu-sparkline-arc
title: Narrative Sparkline
description: Duarte-style narrative sparkline decks: one oscillating SVG bézier waveform spanning the full 1920×1080 canvas, brand-orange (#FF6B2C) turning-point annotations, greyed ghost comparison lines, stroke-dashoffset progressive reveal, mono hairline chrome, Inter + Geist Mono. Built for change narratives, before/after contrasts, and data story arcs. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design narrative-sparkline (references/design-styles.md · 中性派 · Sparkline叙事波形), generated from spec into a full multi-section deck.

description_i18n.en: Duarte-style narrative sparkline decks: one oscillating SVG bézier waveform spanning the full 1920×1080 canvas, brand-orange (#FF6B2C) turning-point annotations, greyed ghost comparison lines, stroke-dashoffset progressive reveal, mono hairline chrome, Inter + Geist Mono. Built for change narratives, before/after contrasts, and data story arcs. Based on https://github.com/alchaincyf/huashu-design narrative-sparkline (references/design-styles.md · 中性派 · Sparkline叙事波形), generated from spec into a full multi-section deck.
description_i18n.zh-CN: Duarte 流派叙事波形幻灯片：横贯 1920×1080 全屏的 SVG 贝塞尔振荡波形线、品牌橙 #FF6B2C 转折点标注、灰化对照波形、stroke-dashoffset 逐步 reveal、等宽字 hairline 信息条，Inter + Geist Mono 双字体。适合变革叙事、before/after 对照与数据故事弧线。基于花叔 huashu-design 的 narrative-sparkline 规格（design-styles.md 中性派 · Sparkline叙事波形）按 spec 生成完整多章节 deck。

query.en: Create a Duarte-style narrative-sparkline {{deckType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}} with {{slideCount}}, using the Narrative Sparkline system (based on huashu-design references/design-styles.md · Sparkline叙事波形): a fixed 1920×1080 canvas auto-scaled to the viewport; white pages plus at most 2-3 near-black (#0E0E0C) pages (the solo-line page and the closing); 56px mono hairline chrome strips top and bottom (Geist Mono 11px uppercase tracked labels, orange `/` separator, orange right-hand label, orange `P.NN` page marker); the two-font system Inter (headlines 900/-4px tracking, body 19px/1.8) + Geist Mono (all labels, annotations, and tabular numerals) loaded via one Google Fonts @import; exactly one accent #FF6B2C — the brand orange — reserved for turning points, annotation dots, key glyphs and single punctuation marks inside headlines, with greyed ghost lines (#C9C7C2, solid or 2/10 dashed) as the comparison voice. The visual skeleton of every page is an SVG sparkline: full-bleed `.spark` SVGs with smooth cubic-bézier paths (preserveAspectRatio='none' for the line layer, a second non-scaled SVG layer for annotation dots and text so circles stay round); annotation points = orange dot + soft halo (+ optional ring for the inflection) + mono uppercase label; progressive reveal via pathLength='1' + stroke-dasharray:1 + stroke-dashoffset animated to 0 when the slide becomes `.active`, with staggered d1/d2/d3 segment delays and p1…p5 dot fade-ins. Draw layouts from the locked enumeration: cover (waveform under a giant statement headline with what-is/turn/new-bliss dots) / contents hung on the waveform / what-is low flat grey waveform with a dashed industry ghost line + stat strip / turning-point giant mono numeral + V-shaped inflection with ringed orange dot / before-after stacked contrast waveforms (grey top, orange bottom) / dark solo-line page (one orange line, one annotation, one big number) / evidence waveform with 4 labelled value dots + mini-sparkline summary strip / roadmap with three progressively-revealed segments + phase columns / quote page with orange SVG quote marks and a ghost waveline footer / dark closing where the curve climbs out of the top-right edge. No emoji, no gradients, no shadows, no second accent color, no chart libraries — every chart is a hand-written inline SVG path. Build a single self-contained HTML file by copying example.html and replacing content only — keep its design tokens, chrome strips, sparkline/reveal CSS, and navigation script (←/→/Space keys, #/N hash routing, click zones, counter pill) intact. Use the user's real numbers and real turning-point dates, never lorem ipsum or invented data; Chinese copy uses 「」 quotes; replace all fictional 澈流/CHELIU demo content.
query.zh-CN: 用「叙事波形」体系为 {{audience}} 做一套关于 {{topic}} 的 {{deckType}}（页数 {{slideCount}}）：1920×1080 固定画布、横贯全屏的 SVG 贝塞尔振荡波形线作为每页视觉骨架、品牌橙 #FF6B2C 只标转折点与标注圆点、灰化对照波形 #C9C7C2、stroke-dashoffset 逐段 reveal、上下 56px 等宽字 hairline 信息条、Inter + Geist Mono 双字体。版式从封面/挂线目录/现状低位波形/巨数转折/上下对照波形/黑底孤线/四标注证据/逐段路线/引语/爬出画面的结尾枚举中取用，白页为主、深页最多 2-3 张。从 example.html 复制出单文件、只换内容，保留 token、信息条、波形 reveal CSS 和导航脚本；用真实数据与真实转折日期、替换全部「澈流」演示内容。完整规格以英文版为准（follow the en query above）。

inputs.name: topic
inputs.label: Topic
inputs.placeholder: 你的主题，例如：客服体系智能化转型复盘

inputs.name: audience
inputs.label: Audience
inputs.placeholder: 全员大会 / 管理层 / 客户峰会
